message: Command `echo "=== GIT STATUS ===" && (git status --short 2>/dev/null || echo '(not a git repo)') && echo "" && echo "=== RECENT COMMITS ===" && (git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo '(no git history)') && echo "" && echo "=== DIRECTORY TREE (depth 2) ===" && (find . -maxdepth 2 -not -path '*/\.*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/__pycache__/*' -not -path '*/venv/*' | head -80 || ls -la) && echo "" && echo "=== BACKGROUND PROCESSES ===" && (ps aux 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo '(ps not available)')` executed with exit code 1.
content:
